debug_info.goal:
U : Type
A : Set U
⊢ one_to_one (HTPI.Exercises.val_image U A)

  apply Set.ext

  constructor <;> intro hx

  intro X1 X2 h
  apply Set.ext
  intro x
  constructor <;> intro hx
  case mp =>
    have h1 : x.val ∈ val_image A X1 := ⟨x, hx, rfl⟩

    obtain ⟨y, hy, hy'⟩ := h1
    simp_all
  case mpr =>
    have h1 : x.val ∈ val_image A X2 := ⟨x, hx, rfl⟩
    rw [← h] at h1

    simp_all
